form.title: GDPR Information
form.subtitle: Data protection compliance

profileType.label: Profile type
profileType.employeeHint: Internal company profile - no consent required
profileType.externalHint: External candidate - a consent request will be sent

candidateName.label: Candidate full name
candidateName.hint: Real name of the candidate (may differ from displayed name if anonymized)

candidateEmail.label: Candidate email
candidateEmail.hint: The consent request email will be sent to this address

form.gdprNotice: Under GDPR, candidate consent is required to store their CV.

errors.emailRequired: Candidate email is required for external profiles

success.emailSent: An email has been sent to {{email}}

response.title: Consent Request
response.subtitle: CV Storage and Processing
response.message: {{firm}} would like to keep your CV in their talent pool to offer you relevant professional opportunities.
response.whyWeProcess: Why we store and process your CV
response.whyItem1: Keep your CV in our talent pool and contact you
response.whyItem2: Analyze your CV (extraction: skills, experience, keywords)
response.whyItem3: Improve / rephrase your CV and adapt it to opportunities
response.whyItem4: Evaluate the match between your profile and opportunities
response.automatedProcessing: These automated processes help identify suitable opportunities. They do not, by themselves, produce an automated decision concerning you.
response.storeItem1: Your CV and the information it contains
response.storeItem2: Your contact details to reach you
response.storeItem3: Analyses and scores generated by our tools
response.retentionPeriod: Retention period: 2 years maximum. You can withdraw your consent at any time.
response.rights: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, limit, object and port your data. Contact our DPO to exercise your rights.
response.footer: This form complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

errors.alreadyProcessed: This request has already been processed

success.acceptedMessage: Your CV will be kept in our talent pool.
success.refusedMessage: Your CV will be deleted from our database.
success.retentionInfo: Your data will be kept for a maximum of 2 years.
